name: Owl
description: Stealth hunting intelligence — asymmetric ear placement creates 3D acoustic triangulation accurate to 1° in azimuth and elevation. Serrated leading-edge feathers break turbulence into micro-vortices, achieving near-silent flight below prey hearing threshold. Tubular eyes with 100x human light sensitivity and 270° head rotation compensate for fixed eye sockets. The geometry of silence and precision.

core_attributes.neurology: asymmetric auditory cortex, enhanced rod-cell retina, cervical rotation system
core_attributes.pattern: asymmetric acoustic triangulation, silent flight aerodynamics, extreme low-light vision
